caption: In a brightly lit indoor environment, a woman with brown hair, wearing a navy blue blazer over a white shirt and a light blue surgical mask, stands while holding and reading a white piece of paper. To her right, another woman wearing a similar blue surgical mask, a navy blue blazer, and a light blue shirt is also present. In the background, there is a white wall and what appears to be medical equipment or supplies. Each frame features a list of names and dates on the left side, including "Course content creators, course directors:" and "Course Instructor: Cheralyn Hendrix, MD," as well as a list of "MD Candidates:". A QR code is prominently displayed on the right side of the screen. As the sequence progresses, the woman on the left shifts her posture slightly while continuing to read the document, while the woman on the right remains relatively still.
